name: whatsapp-digest
description: A local, read-only assistant that turns your recent WhatsApp chats into a prioritized digest inside Claude.
long_description: Connects to your WhatsApp (via WhatsApp Web, running locally on your machine) and exposes your recent messages to Claude as read-only tools. Ask Claude for a digest and it returns a short, prioritized brief: what needs a reply, what's time-sensitive, and what's just FYI. Nothing is sent, and nothing leaves your machine except the message text you ask Claude to read.

tools.name: whatsapp_status
tools.description: Check whether WhatsApp is linked and ready.

tools.name: link_whatsapp
tools.description: Open a local QR page to link WhatsApp from your phone.

tools.name: list_chats
tools.description: List recent WhatsApp chats with unread counts.

tools.name: get_messages
tools.description: Get WhatsApp messages from the last N hours.
